item.title: officialgaa: The GAA @officialgaa · 38min Paddy Deegan admits it has been hard to ignore @KilkennyCLG 's critics this year, but he a
item.description: The GAA @officialgaa · 38min Paddy Deegan admits it has been hard to ignore @KilkennyCLG 's critics this year, but he and his team-mates are doing their best to remain positive. #GAABelong De gaa.ie 1 mil
